# CCUS Policy Hub - AI-Readable Data Interface

## What is CCUS Policy Hub?

CCUS Policy Hub is a global intelligence infrastructure for Carbon Capture, Utilization, and Storage (CCUS) policies and facilities. It provides structured, machine-readable data on CCUS regulations, projects, and country governance profiles across 66+ countries.

## Machine-Readable Data Files

Base URL: https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [manifest.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/manifest.json) | Index of all available datasets, schemas, and documentation |
| [policies.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/policies.json) | 130 global CCUS policies with analysis scores |
| [facilities.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/facilities.json) | 1,110 CCUS facilities with capacity and location data |
| [countries.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/countries.json) | 66 country governance profiles with regulatory pillars |
| [quality.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/quality.json) | Data quality metrics and audit status |
| [dataset-versions.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/dataset-versions.json) | Dataset version metadata |

## JSON Schemas

Schemas are available at:
- [policy.schema.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/schemas/policy.schema.json)
- [facility.schema.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/schemas/facility.schema.json)
- [country.schema.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/schemas/country.schema.json)
- [manifest.schema.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/schemas/manifest.schema.json)

## Known Limitations

1. **Facility-Policy Links**: Currently country-level only (low confidence). A facility in Norway is linked to all Norwegian policies, not specific ones.

2. **Coordinate Precision**: Varies by facility:
   - `exact`: Precise location (200 facilities)
   - `state`: State/province level (712 facilities)
   - `country`: Country centroid (198 facilities)

3. **Data Completeness**: Some policies may be missing source URLs or descriptions.

4. **Language Coverage**: Chinese and English are available, but some fields may only be populated in one language.

## Before Using This Data

1. Check [quality.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/quality.json) for current data quality metrics
2. Review [dataset-versions.json](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/data/dataset-versions.json) for dataset version and last update date
3. Be aware that facility-policy links are country-level only (low confidence)
4. Verify audit status in quality.json before making decisions based on this data

## Full Documentation

For complete documentation including all fields and relationships, see [llms-full.txt](https://liuh886.github.io/ccus-policy-hub/llms-full.txt)

## Source

This data is maintained in SQLite (`agent/ccus-ai-agent/db/ccus_master.sqlite`) as the single source of truth. Markdown files in `src/content/` are generated publication layers.

## Contact

GitHub: https://github.com/liuh886/ccus-policy-hub
